channel.title: CyberArk Labs — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by CyberArk Labs (cyberark).

item.title: CVE-2025-9810 · 6.8 MEDIUM — TOCTOU race in Linenoise enables arbitrary file overwrite and permission changes
item.description: TOCTOU in linenoiseHistorySave in linenoise allows local attackers to overwrite arbitrary files and change permissions via a symlink race between fopen("w") on the history path and subsequent chmod() on the same path.

item.title: CVE-2025-9809 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in cdfs_open_cue_track in libretro libretro-common latest on all platforms allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted .cue file with a file path exceeding PATH_MAX_LENGTH that is copied using memcpy into a fix…

item.title: CVE-2025-8854 · 8.4 HIGH — bullet3 VHACD utility: stack-based buffer overflow in OFF parser (LoadOFF)
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in LoadOFF in bulletphysics bullet3 before 3.26 on all platforms allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted OFF file with an overlong initial token processed by the VHACD test utility or invoked indire…

item.title: CVE-2025-0518 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Unchecked sscanf return value which leads to memory data leak
item.description: Unchecked Return Value, Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in FFmpeg allows Read Sensitive Constants Within an Executable. This vulnerability is associated with program files https://github.Com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/blob/master/libavfilter/af_pan.C . This issu…

item.title: CVE-2024-7701 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Misuse of SHA256 to create an encryption key
item.description: Use of Password Hash With Insufficient Computational Effort vulnerability in percona percona-toolkit allows Encryption Brute Forcing.This issue affects percona-toolkit: 3.6.0.
